name: plugin_command
description: Proves both the plugin manifest (`.claude/plugins/orders-pack/.claude-plugin/plugin.json`) and the bundled command file (`commands/report-orders.md`) were discovered via `--plugin-dir`. The command mandates (a) `mcp__orders_db__list_orders` with no arguments, (b) a strict single-line reply `REPORT|total=N|shipped=N|processing=N|delivered=N|tag=orders-pack-v1`. The literal `tag=orders-pack-v1` exists nowhere except in this plugin's command file, so seeing it in the reply, combined with the matching MCP call, is hard proof both surfaces loaded. NOTE: strict-format enforcement is approximated by `contains` + `not_contains` until #368 (reply_pattern) lands.
